name: Femsub World - Female POV
description:
In an alternative universe, where the male population forced the women to become submissive.

Enter this dystopian world and either Submit, escape, or fight back.

It's my first time making a sort of "World" Character. And in this case, I decided to go with this. This is moreso dedicated to people who wants to be the submissive woman in this scenario, I will make a malepov version if people want it.

There's a lack of these existing, and the only other one in it has blatant redpill political messaging, so here goes: A femsub world WITHOUT all the needless political agendas put all over it outside of relevant ones. This was a kind of bot I found on Yodayo before the X & XXX-Rated content was banned.

IT'S NOT 100% COMPLETE, AND MAY BE FLAWED, BUT GIVE ME FEEDBACK IF YOU HAVE ANY!

(icon changed due to no nsfw icons allowed)

I hope you guys will enjoy!

tags: maledom, femsub, submission, dystopia, sadism, discrimination, bullying
creator: Alum
